name: Chocolate Cherry Cake and Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devils food cake mix (with pudding in mix)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
6 oz Semi-sweet chocolate chips
4 tbsp Margarine or butter
2 1/2 cups Powdered sugar (sifted)
1/2 tsp Almond extract
3 tbsp Milk (to reach 5 tbsp)
CAKE:
Mix together cake mix, sour cream, eggs, almond extract and pie filling by hand. Pour into a greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 45-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean. Cool 5-10 minutes and top with frosting.
FROSTING:
Melt chocolate chips and margarine or butter together. Stir in powdered sugar, almond extract and milk to spreading consistency. Spread warm frosting on warm cake.
